Computing chiral, fuzzy, weighted and truncated geometrical molecular descriptors based on tensor algebra.

QuBiLs-MIDAS software is for the calculation of 3D molecular descriptors based on the two-linear (bilinear), three-lineal and four-linear (multi-linear or N-linear) algebraic forms.
